completedPhaseClaimDetails.evidence: 8-artifact bugfix-fastlane packet authored under specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler/bugs/BUG-054-002-notification-pipeline-metrics-unwired/ (bug.md + spec.md + design.md + scopes.md + scenario-manifest.json + report.md + state.json + uservalidation.md).

Declared 6 smackerel_notification_* metric vars + init() registration in internal/metrics/metrics.go (+95 lines) and wired each at a real live emit site across internal/notification/{service,normalizer,decision,output_logic,reaction_logic}.go (+74/-5 lines) via IDE replace_string_in_file/multi_replace_string_in_file. Bounded-enum labels only; 6 design.md metrics deferred (no dead declarations).

Authored 7 adversarial unit tests in internal/notification/metrics_emit_test.go (registration+bounded-labels, ingest, delivery, action, normalization, dedupe, redaction-safety). Scenario-first red->green proof: delivery emit disabled -> TestNotificationDeliveryAttemptsIncrementsOnDispatch RED (= 0, want 1); restored -> GREEN. Full red->green block in BUG-054-002/report.md Test Evidence.

go test ./internal/metrics/... ./internal/notification/... -count=1 -v all GREEN (ok internal/metrics, ok internal/notification, ok internal/notification/source/ntfy); zero FAIL lines; 7 new TestNotification* tests pass with no collateral failures. Additive observability; existing pipeline behavior unchanged.

Single-exit named-return + defer pattern avoids per-branch .Inc() duplication in Normalize/Decide/Dispatch; only 3 small helpers introduced (normalizationErrorKind, notificationActionStatus, notificationStageDurationMs), each reused across emit/return paths. No dead code or speculative generality.

go build ./... exit 0; go vet ./internal/notification/... ./internal/metrics/... exit 0. New internal/notification -> internal/metrics import introduces no cycle (metrics does not import notification). prometheus *Vec emits are goroutine-safe.

SCN-054-024 enforced: every label value is a bounded enum or known source/channel identifier; none derives from RawPayload/Title/Body. TestNotificationMetricsDoNotLeakPayloadInLabels drives SUPERSECRET-PAYLOAD-MARKER through delivery/normalize/ingest and asserts no label leaks it; TestNotificationMetricFamiliesRegisteredWithBoundedLabels rejects any label outside each family's bounded allowlist.

Packet guards green: artifact-lint.sh PASSED and state-transition-guard.sh 0 BLOCKs for specs/054-notification-intelligence-handler/bugs/BUG-054-002-notification-pipeline-metrics-unwired. Full block in BUG-054-002/report.md Validation Evidence section.

git status --short confirms the change set is confined to the 7 source/test files (internal/metrics/metrics.go + 5 internal/notification/*.go + internal/notification/metrics_emit_test.go) plus this packet directory. Unrelated externally-modified .github/bubbles/** framework files are NOT staged/reverted/touched. Per task contract this packet does NOT commit; orchestrator commits.

Deferred-metrics rationale (6 design.md metrics not wired) documented in bug.md Root Cause + report.md Summary for a future separately-scoped fix. No docs/ managed-doc mutation required for additive observability.

scopeProgress.name: Wire The 6 Core Notification Pipeline Metrics (Single-Scope Bugfix-Fastlane)

rollback: Pure git revert of the 7 source/test files removes the 6 smackerel_notification_* families and their emits, restoring the pre-fix observability gap (zero behavior change to the notification pipeline).
